reference_finding: Reference-target axis (schema v4: semantic⊕shape⊕affect⊕reference, reusing SelfAddressRouter features) PROVES via ablation that it opens the residual pair: self_disclosure +0.015 (OFF) -> +0.031 (ON); self_directed +0.012 (OFF) -> +0.044 (ON).
